author: doll-agent
content:
Add greedy contraction-order picking to einsum_pairwise. Compute label_size map up front; at each pairwise step, score every (i, j) pair by the size of the resulting intermediate (= product of dim sizes for labels in i∪j that are needed downstream or in the output). Pick the pair with smallest intermediate. Reorder current_ops/current_inputs and continue with the existing pair-contraction step.

For chain expressions like 'ab,bc,cd,de->ae' this can pick a different order than left-to-right when intermediate sizes differ. Adds 1 test exercising the 4-operand chain expression.
